---
title: "03 - SVM Example for State Classification"
format: pdf
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Objective

Classify operating states from sensor features using an RBF SVM.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
```

## Simulated feature dataset

```{r}
set.seed(202)

n <- 1500
states <- c("idle", "stable", "anomaly")

dat <- tibble(
  state = sample(states, n, replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.30, 0.55, 0.15)),
  power = rnorm(n, if_else(state == "idle", 20, if_else(state == "stable", 58, 80)), 7),
  vibration = rnorm(n, if_else(state == "idle", 0.7, if_else(state == "stable", 2.0, 4.1)), 0.5),
  sound = rnorm(n, if_else(state == "idle", 44, if_else(state == "stable", 63, 81)), 5),
  temp = rnorm(n, if_else(state == "idle", 30, if_else(state == "stable", 43, 57)), 3)
) |>
  mutate(state = factor(state))

split <- initial_split(dat, prop = 0.8, strata = state)
train <- training(split)
test <- testing(split)
```

## Train SVM and score

```{r}
rec <- recipe(state ~ ., data = train) |>
  step_normalize(all_predictors())

svm_spec <- svm_rbf(mode = "classification", cost = 1, rbf_sigma = 0.05) |>
  set_engine("kernlab")

wf <- workflow() |>
  add_recipe(rec) |>
  add_model(svm_spec)

fit <- fit(wf, data = train)

pred <- predict(fit, test) |>
  bind_cols(test |> select(state))

metrics <- metric_set(accuracy, kap)(pred, truth = state, estimate = .pred_class)
metrics
